campaignevents-rest-enable-registration-: Looma oggola inaad hawlgeliso diiwaangelinta dhacdooyinka.
campaignevents-rest-edit-page-nonlocal: Diiwaangelinta dhacdadan waxaa laga hawlgeliyey wiki-ga soo socda, waana in halkaas lagu tafatiro: $1.
campaignevents-rest-delete-already-delet: Diiwaangelintan dhacdada hore ayaa loo tirtiray.
campaignevents-rest-user-not-found: Ma jiro isticmaale leh aqoonsigan dhexe.
campaignevents-rest-remove-participants-: Halbeegga 'user_ids' waa inuu noqdaa liis aqoonsiyo isticmaalayaal ah, ama waa inuu noqdaa madhan (si looga saaro dhammaan isticmaalayaasha)
Fadlan ka saar ka qaybgalayaasha ee $1, oo ah wiki-ga lagu abuuray dhacdada.
campaignevents-rest-list-participants-em: Shaandhada magaca isticmaalaha, haddii la cayimay, waa inay noqotaa qoraal aan madhnayn.
campaignevents-rest-list-participants-ca: Looma oggola inaad aragto ka qaybgalayaasha si gaar ah isu diiwaangeliyey dhacdadan.
campaignevents-rest-set-organizers-empty: <var>organizer_usernames</var> waa inuu noqdaa liis magacyada isticmaalayaasha ah, mana noqon karo madhan
campaignevents-rest-set-organizers-nonlo: Fadlan ku xadid qabanqaabiyayaasha $1, oo ah wiki-ga lagu abuuray dhacdada.
campaignevents-rest-register-invalid-ans: Jawaabta su'aasha $1 ma aha mid sax ah
campaignevents-rest-register-for-event-n: Fadlan ku dhammaystir diiwaangelintaada dhacdada ee $1, oo ah wiki-ga lagu abuuray dhacdada.
campaignevents-rest-delete-event-nonloca: Fadlan tirtir diiwaangelintaada dhacdada ee $1, oo ah wiki-ga lagu abuuray dhacdada.
campaignevents-rest-email-participants-n: Fadlan iimayl u dir ka qaybgalayaasha ee $1, oo ah wiki-ga lagu abuuray dhacdada.
campaignevents-rest-contribution-not-fou: Ma jiro wax ku biirin leh aqoonsigan.
campaignevents-rest-delete-contribution-: Looma oggola inaad tirtirto wax ku biirintan.
